content: ✅ Completed task-014 - Advanced Stats display implemented! Changes: 1) domain.ml: Added ts_pct, efg_pct to player_aggregate 2) db.ml: Updated all 6 queries to include COALESCE(AVG(s.ts_pct),0), COALESCE(AVG(s.efg_pct),0) 3) views.ml: Added gorgeous Advanced Stats card with gradient backgrounds, tooltips for TS%, eFG%, Game Score
